prediction.reasoning: AT&T (T) is a large-cap dividend stock with relatively low volatility. Based on typical 3-day price movements for telecom utilities, I estimated a daily volatility of approximately 1% and used a random walk model. The point estimate assumes no systematic drift over the short 3-day period. Confidence intervals are constructed assuming normally distributed returns with widening ranges for higher confidence levels.
